form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Finished off last campaign 15th of 17 at this track in the G1 Suipacha on October 4 over 1000m, 16 len behind Labrado carrying 60kg at $248.25. First up last campaign 3rd in a small field at this track on July 4 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Gracias Gringo with 52kg at $7.85. Expect a bold showing.

form.formComment: Entire back from a spell of ten weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Previously first up; ran last of 8 at Palermo October 11 over 1000m, 13 len behind Santo Federal with 57kg at $27.05. Definite winning hope.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months made ground from midfield; 2nd of 8 at this track on March 28 over 1100m, on rain affected going; 0.8 len behind Gracias Gringo with 57kg at $4. Previously second-up 4th of 7 at Palermo on January 15 over 1000m, 9 len behind Tormenta China carrying 54kg at $13.80. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.
